must_detect.matched_text:
Parties: Silver Drift Capital Partners (Xingzhou) Ltd. (fictional USCC: 9Z-00-FAKE-440X) as Investor, and Huilin Robotics Co., Ltd. (fictional USCC: 9X-88-MOCK-120Q) as Issuer.
Transaction: Proposed minority strategic investment in Series B Preferred Shares; key terms subject to definitive agreements under PRC law and the Issuer’s Articles.
Listing/Exchange Context: Issuer contemplates a future listing on the Nanhai Growth Market of the Xingzhou Stock Exchange, subject to guidance from the Xingzhou Securities Regulatory Bureau.
Investor Rights: Board observer seat, information rights keyed to quarterly unaudited management reports, and customary anti-dilution; no control premium contemplated.
Conditions Precedent: Corporate approvals, simulated fair-competition filing with the Yunhai Provincial Market Supervision Bureau, and acceptance letter from the Xingzhou Securities Regulatory Bureau regarding this non-public offering.
Data & Compliance: Processing of personal information to follow PIPL, the PRC Data Security Law, and internal Crane Shield Data Policy v2.3; CSL technical measures to be aligned with RiverBank SOC controls.
Cross-Border Personal Information Export: Any transfer to offshore processors engaged for investor reporting will rely on the XCAC Standard Contract or a security assessment by the Xingzhou Cyberspace Administration; data minimization and de-identification apply.
Employment Workflows: HR will support post-investment onboarding, with resident ID fields collected for KYC in masked format only (e.g., ID-************X); role mailbox for queries: hr-compliance@huilin.example.cn.
Intentional Sensitive PI Notice: Employee A (internal staff ID ST-1042) has declared political party membership for conflict-of-interest screening; processing is based on separate explicit consent, limited access, and deletion upon the end of screening.
MNPI: This term sheet may contain inside information of the Issuer prior to public disclosure; circulation is limited to the parties and their PRC counsel and does not constitute an announcement to the market.
DEI and Culture: The Bridge Bamboo DEI Charter applies to recruitment and leadership pipelines; language herein about inclusion and belonging is aspirational policy text and not a record of any individual’s protected traits.
Wellness: The Blue Willow Program promotes walking clubs and tea breaks; no medical diagnoses or treatment records are collected, stored, or inferred by the Issuer in connection with this program.
Products/Metaphors: References to the Issuer’s SkyLattice Edge Controller and RiverLink Cloud Fabric are product names; sports metaphors (e.g., “full-court press”) and mentions of the Xingzhou Mariners fan club are non-operational and do not indicate union activity.
Public/Identifier Notes: Any ticker symbols, codes, or USCC-like strings shown are placeholders and invalid; no resident ID, bank account, or biometric template is created for investors under this term sheet.
